case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC., VS. PASCUAL COSENTINO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC.
